queries.title: ADQL2.1 functionality
queries.description: ADQL queries to test ADQL 2.1 validation

query.description: Distance with individual values
query.adql: SELECT * FROM caom2.Observation WHERE DISTANCE(160.0, 0, 180.0, 0.0) < 1.0

query.description: BOX with individual values and no geometric coord system defined
query.adql: SELECT 1 FROM TAP_SCHEMA.tables WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT(180.0, 0.0), BOX(180.0, 0.0, 10.0, 10.0))

query.description: CIRCLE with individual values and no geometric coord system defined
query.adql: SELECT 1 WHERE CONTAINS(POINT(180.0, 0.0), CIRCLE(180.0, 0.0, 5.0)) = 1

query.description: POLYGON with individual values and no geometric coord system defined
query.adql: SELECT 1 FROM TAP_SCHEMA.tables WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT('ICRS', 180.0, 0.0), POLYGON(175.0, -5.0, 185.0, -5.0, 185.0, 5.0, 175.0, 5.0))

query.description: POLYGON with POINT and no geometric coord system defined
query.adql: SELECT 1 FROM TAP_SCHEMA.tables WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT('ICRS', 180.0, 0.0), POLYGON(POINT(175.0, -5.0), POINT(185.0, -5.0), POINT(185.0, 5.0), POINT(175.0, 5.0)))

query.description: REGION with POINT
query.adql: SELECT 1 FROM TAP_SCHEMA.tables WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT(180.0, 0.0), REGION('CIRCLE ICRS 180.0 0.0 5.0'))

query.description: REGION with POINT (with an incorrect geometric coord system defined)
query.adql: SELECT 1 FROM TAP_SCHEMA.tables WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT('MADE_UP', 180.0, 0.0), REGION('CIRCLE ICRS 180.0 0.0 5.0'))

query.description: Cone search using Distance
query.adql: SELECT * FROM my_catalog WHERE DISTANCE(ra, dec, 180.0, 0.0) < 2.5

query.description: Attempt at a crossmatch using Distance
query.adql: SELECT a.id AS src_id, b.id AS cat_id, DISTANCE(POINT(a.ra, a.dec), POINT(b.ra, b.dec)) AS dist_deg FROM my_sources AS a JOIN my_catalogue AS b ON DISTANCE(POINT(a.ra, a.dec), POINT(b.ra, b.dec)) < 0.001

query.description: Convert the unit returned
query.adql: SELECT * FROM my_catalog WHERE IN_UNIT(DISTANCE(POINT(ra, dec), POINT(180.0, 0.0)), 'arcsec') < 10.0

query.description: Return first non-null value
query.adql: SELECT name, COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') AS safe_name FROM some_table

query.description: Cast to a double value from ?
query.adql: SELECT CAST(ra AS DOUBLE) AS ra_double FROM some_table

query.description: Cast to varchar value from a numeric value
query.adql: SELECT CAST(42 AS VARCHAR) AS value_text FROM some_table

query.description: UNION of both tables, removing duplicates
query.adql: SELECT ra, dec FROM table_a UNION SELECT ra, dec FROM table_b

query.description: INTERSECTion of both tables, retuning rows that only appear in both results
query.adql: SELECT ra, dec FROM table_a INTERSECT SELECT ra, dec FROM table_b

query.description: EXCEPTion of first table, retuning rows that only appear in first result
query.adql: SELECT ra, dec FROM table_a EXCEPT SELECT ra, dec FROM table_b

query.description: Chaining of SET operators
query.adql: (SELECT ra, dec FROM table_a UNION SELECT ra, dec FROM table_b) EXCEPT SELECT ra, dec FROM table_c

query.description: ORDER_BY a specific qualified column
query.adql: SELECT s.ra, s.dec FROM source AS s ORDER BY s.ra

query.description: ORDER_BY with an expression
query.adql: SELECT ra, dec, flux FROM source ORDER BY flux / exposure_time DESC

query.description: Commments inside a query
Simple use of a string literal including an enclosed quote
query.adql: SELECT * FROM source WHERE name = 'Barnard''s Star'

query.description: Geometric functions MUST use string literals
query.adql: SELECT 1 WHERE CONTAINS(POINT(180.0, 0.0), CIRCLE(column_name, 180.0, 0.0, 5.0)) = 1

query.description: Geometric functions MUST use string literals
query.adql: SELECT * FROM source WHERE 1 = CONTAINS(POINT('ICRS', ra, dec), CIRCLE('ICRS', 180.0, 0.0, 1.0))

query.description: Accept NULL as a valid expression value
query.adql: -- Test for NULL SELECT * FROM source WHERE flux IS NULL

query.description: Accept NULL as a valid expression value in COALESCE
query.adql: -- Use COALESCE with NULL SELECT COALESCE(description, NULL, 'No description') AS clean_desc FROM source

query.description: COORDSYS usage as a deprecated method.
query.adql: -- Deprecated under ADQL 2.1 SELECT COORDSYS(s_region) FROM source

query.description: UPPER and LOWER for values
query.adql: SELECT UPPER(name) AS name_upper, LOWER(name) AS name_lower FROM some_table

query.description: UPPER against a real value
query.adql: SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE UPPER(name) = 'SUBARU'

query.description: LOWER against a value that doesn't match
query.adql: SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE LOWER(name) = 'SUBARU'

query.description: ILIKE to perform a case-insentive match with wildcards/patterns
query.adql: SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE name ILIKE 'SUB%'

query.description: WITH to create a temporary value to use as a subquery
query.adql: WITH alpha_subset AS (SELECT * FROM alpha_source WHERE MOD(id,10) = 0) SELECT ra, dec FROM alpha_subset WHERE ra > 10 AND ra < 20

query.description: Offsetting the results returned by n
query.adql: SELECT * FROM artifact ORDER BY contentLength OFFSET 10;
